title: lichen_l2_input does not validate len against MAX_LORA_FRAME before lichen_link_rx
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:639-743 (lichen_l2_input)

Bug: The function validates minimum frame length (LICHEN_MIN_FRAME_LEN = 9) at line 659, but does not validate maximum length against MAX_LORA_FRAME (255). If lichen_link_rx() does not perform its own bounds check, a malformed frame larger than 255 bytes could cause buffer overflows.

Additionally, the code at line 736-741 (non-LICHEN_LINK path) does check len > sizeof(rx_ipv6_buf), but this is 240 bytes - smaller than MAX_LORA_FRAME. For LICHEN_LINK path, lichen_link_rx() receives the raw len without explicit upper bound validation in this function.

Impact: Depends on whether lichen_link_rx() has its own bounds checking. If not, potential buffer overflow. At minimum, clearer code to check explicit maximum at entry point.

Fix: Add explicit check: if (len > MAX_LORA_FRAME) return; after the minimum length check.
